test_name: Verify User Login with Microsoft Azure OAuth
description: This test scenario ensures the completion of login using Microsoft Azure OAuth and checks for user redirection to the dashboard upon successful login.
steps: Launch the login page at https://dev.roost.ai/login.
Click on the 'Sign in with Microsoft' link.
Enter Microsoft account email on the login page.
Complete the Microsoft multi-factor authentication if prompted.
Check for user profile visibility on the dashboard.
expected_results: Successful redirection to Microsoft login page.
User logs in with valid Microsoft credentials.
User's profile is shown on the dashboard.
edge_cases: Account is not linked with required permissions.
data_requirements: Microsoft account with permission to sign in.
Account is not locked or suspended.
dependencies: Access to Microsoft login and authentication pages.
accessibility_requirements: Screen reader support on login page.
Contrast checks for OAuth button text.
